# Gardening Knowledge Base

Durable knowledge about growing food and flowers in raised beds.

## Scope

- Watering, feeding and soil care for raised beds
- Seed starting and propagation
- Composting and mulching practice

## When to Use

- When a question is about growing, feeding or watering plants
- When choosing companions or planning a bloom calendar
- When troubleshooting soil or compost problems

## Notes for Agents

- Keep routing boundaries out of Scope so fallback routing stays clean.
